data.title: Domino's Growth Strategies Paying Off, But Goldman Sachs Analyst Warns Of Competitive Pressures Ahead
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst Teddy Farley expresses views on Domino's Pizza's mixed Q3 results. Revenue growth boosted by higher supply chain revenues and U.S. franchise advertising. Revised 2024 projections due to challenging macroeconomic environment. Analyst maintains Buy rating with $515 target price.
